title: CaseloadStatistic
description: An aggregate benefit caseload / enrollment figure for a program, period, and (optionally) geography — the recipient/enrollee/case counts HRA publishes each month. AGGREGATE ONLY: no individual case or resident is ever exposed. Canonical schema reconciling 'Total SNAP Recipients' (5c4s-jwtq), 'Cash Assistance Recipients in NYC' (qtrj-g3nm), 'Citywide HRA-Administered Medicaid Enrollees' (33db-aeds), 'Cash Assistance, Medicaid, and SNAP - Borough/Community District Report' (5awp-wfkt), 'District Resource Statement' (au2c-rs69), and 'Fair Fares Enrollees' (3tw8-6si8).

value.description: The count/value for this program, measure, and period.

communityDistrict.description: 'Community District (CD)' when the figure is district-level.

breakdown.description: Optional sub-measures reported alongside the headline value (e.g. Medicaid: 'Medical Assistance Only', 'Cash Assistance - Medical Assistance', 'Nursing Home').
